admissions.name: Admissions
admissions.description: Criteria, how to apply, required documents

courses.name: Courses
courses.description: Duration, timings, fee structure, available programs

faqs.question: How to apply for admission?
faqs.answer:
To apply for SMIT admission:

1️⃣ Visit saylaniwelfare.com/smit
2️⃣ Click on 'Apply Now' or 'Admissions'
3️⃣ Fill out the online registration form
4️⃣ Upload required documents
5️⃣ Select your preferred course and city
6️⃣ Submit and wait for test/interview call

📅 Admissions are open throughout the year!

faqs.question: What are the eligibility requirements?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Eligibility Criteria:

📌 Minimum Education: Matric/O-Levels
📌 Age: 18-35 years (flexible)
📌 Pakistani CNIC or B-Form
📌 Basic computer knowledge (helpful but not required)
📌 Commitment to attend classes regularly

⚠️ Some advanced courses require Intermediate/Graduation.

faqs.question: What documents are required?
faqs.answer:
Required Documents for SMIT Admission:

📄 CNIC copy (front & back)
📄 Recent passport-size photograph
📄 Last educational certificate/marksheet
📄 Domicile (if available)

💡 Bring originals for verification during interview.

faqs.question: Is there an entry test?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Selection Process:

✅ Basic aptitude test (for some courses)
✅ Short interview
✅ Document verification

The test is simple and designed to assess basic understanding. Don't worry - it's not difficult!

faqs.question: What is the age limit?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Age Requirements:

📌 Minimum Age: 18 years
📌 Maximum Age: 35 years (flexible)
📌 Some courses may have different limits

💡 Age requirements are flexible for deserving candidates. Contact your nearest campus for special cases.

faqs.question: What is the admission deadline?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Admission Timeline:

🗓️ Admissions are OPEN YEAR-ROUND!
📢 New batches start every 2-3 months
✅ No strict deadline - apply anytime
⏰ Early registration recommended for seat availability

💡 Check social media for next batch announcements.

faqs.question: Can females apply?
faqs.answer:
Yes! SMIT welcomes female students! 👩‍💻

✅ Equal opportunities for all genders
✅ Separate timings available at some campuses
✅ Safe and respectful learning environment
✅ Many successful female graduates

🌟 SMIT encourages women in tech!

faqs.question: Can international students apply?
faqs.answer:
International Student Admissions:

🌍 Yes, international students can apply!
📄 Valid passport/visa required
🏠 Must attend physical classes in Pakistan
📞 Contact main campus for special arrangements

💡 Some courses may have online components.

faqs.question: What courses are available?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Course Offerings:

💻 Web Development (HTML, CSS, JS, React)
📱 Mobile App Development (Flutter, React Native)
🔧 MERN Stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node)
🐍 Python & Data Science
🤖 AI & Machine Learning
🎨 Graphic Design & UI/UX
📈 Digital Marketing
🔐 Cyber Security
🎬 Video Editing
🛒 E-commerce & Amazon FBA

faqs.question: What is the duration of courses?
faqs.answer:
Course Durations at SMIT:

⏱️ Short Courses: 3-4 months
⏱️ Standard Courses: 6-8 months
⏱️ Advanced Programs: 9-12 months

📅 Classes: 3-4 days per week
⏰ Session Length: 2-3 hours each

faqs.question: What are the class timings?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Class Timings:

🌅 Morning Batch: 9:00 AM - 12:00 PM
🌤️ Afternoon Batch: 2:00 PM - 5:00 PM
🌙 Evening Batch: 6:00 PM - 9:00 PM

📌 Choose your preferred shift during registration.
📅 Classes typically held 3-4 days/week.

faqs.question: Which course should I choose?
faqs.answer:
Course Recommendations:

🔥 Most Popular:
• Web Development (High demand)
• MERN Stack (Full-stack jobs)
• Mobile App Development (Growing field)

💼 For Quick Jobs:
• Graphic Design
• Digital Marketing

🚀 For Future:
• AI & Machine Learning
• Data Science

💡 Choose based on your interest and career goals!

faqs.question: Is SMIT free?
faqs.answer:
Yes! SMIT is 100% FREE! 🎉

✅ No tuition fees
✅ No hidden charges
✅ Free course materials
✅ Free computer lab access

💡 Some campuses may require a small refundable security deposit (Rs. 1000-2000) which is returned upon course completion.

Saylani Welfare Trust sponsors all education costs!

faqs.question: What is the security deposit?
faqs.answer:
Security Deposit Details:

💰 Amount: Rs. 1,000 - 2,000
✅ Fully refundable upon course completion
📝 Required at some campuses only
🎯 Purpose: Ensure student commitment

⚠️ This is NOT a fee - you get it back when you complete the course successfully!

faqs.question: Are there scholarships available?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Financial Support:

🎓 All courses are already FREE!
💝 Funded by Saylani Welfare Trust
🍽️ Some campuses offer free meals
🚌 Transportation assistance for needy students
📚 Free course materials

✨ SMIT's mission is to provide quality IT education to everyone, regardless of financial status.

faqs.question: Are there any hidden charges?
faqs.answer:
No Hidden Charges at SMIT! ✅

❌ No registration fee
❌ No exam fee
❌ No certificate fee
❌ No lab fee
❌ No material fee

💡 Only a small refundable security deposit at some campuses (Rs. 1000-2000), which is returned upon completion.

faqs.question: How do I pay the security deposit?
faqs.answer:
Security Deposit Payment:

💵 Cash payment at campus office
🏦 Bank transfer (details at campus)
📱 JazzCash/Easypaisa (some campuses)

📋 You'll receive an official receipt
✅ Keep receipt safe for refund claim

💡 Pay only at official SMIT campus offices.

faqs.question: Does SMIT organize hackathons?
faqs.answer:
Yes! SMIT Tech Events:

🏆 Annual Hackathons
💻 24-48 hour coding challenges
👥 Team-based competitions
🎁 Cash prizes & certificates
💼 Industry exposure

📅 Major hackathon usually held in December/January
📱 Follow @smikiofficial for announcements!

faqs.question: What are the hackathon prizes?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Hackathon Prizes:

🥇 1st Place: Rs. 50,000 - 100,000
🥈 2nd Place: Rs. 30,000 - 50,000
🥉 3rd Place: Rs. 15,000 - 25,000

🎁 Additional rewards:
• Certificates for all participants
• Internship opportunities
• Industry recognition
• Goodies & swag

💡 Prizes vary by event and sponsors.

faqs.question: How do I participate in hackathons?
faqs.answer:
How to Join SMIT Hackathons:

1️⃣ Must be enrolled SMIT student
2️⃣ Form a team (2-4 members usually)
3️⃣ Register when announced
4️⃣ Submit project idea
5️⃣ Attend the event

📢 Announcements made via:
• WhatsApp groups
• Social media
• Campus notice boards

💡 Start practicing coding challenges now!

faqs.question: When is the next hackathon?
faqs.answer:
Upcoming SMIT Tech Events:

🗓️ Major hackathons: December - January
💻 Mini coding contests: Monthly
🎯 Project showcases: Every quarter

📱 Stay updated:
• Follow @smikiofficial
• Join campus WhatsApp groups
• Check website regularly

💡 Announcements made 2-4 weeks before events.

faqs.question: Can beginners participate in hackathons?
faqs.answer:
Yes! Beginners Welcome! 🌟

✅ SMIT hackathons have different tracks:
• Beginner Track (3-6 months students)
• Intermediate Track
• Advanced Track

💡 Tips for beginners:
• Team up with experienced students
• Focus on simple but complete projects
• It's about learning, not just winning!

🚀 Many winners were first-time participants!

faqs.question: Are there any workshops?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Regular Events:

🛠️ Weekend Workshops (Web Dev, Apps)
💻 Intensive Bootcamps (1-2 weeks)
🎤 Guest Speaker Sessions
💼 Career Counseling
🏆 Project Showcases

📱 Follow @smikiofficial on social media for announcements!

faqs.question: What is the exam schedule?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Assessment Schedule:

📝 Mid-term Assessment: After 50% course completion
📝 Final Assessment: End of course
📝 Project Submissions: Throughout the course

✅ 80%+ attendance required
✅ Must pass assessments for certificate

faqs.question: What are the holidays?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Holiday Schedule:

🗓️ Eid-ul-Fitr: ~1 week
🗓️ Eid-ul-Adha: ~1 week
🗓️ National Holidays: As per government
🗓️ Winter Break: ~1 week (December)

📢 Holiday announcements are made in advance via WhatsApp groups and notice boards.

faqs.question: Do you give certificates?
faqs.answer:
Yes! SMIT Certification:

🎓 Official SMIT Certificate upon completion
🎓 Industry-recognized credentials
🎓 Some courses offer international cert prep

📌 Requirements:
• 80%+ attendance
• Pass final assessment
• Complete all projects

faqs.question: Does SMIT help with jobs?
faqs.answer:
Yes! SMIT Career Support:

💼 Job placement assistance
📝 Resume/CV building workshops
🎯 Interview preparation
💻 LinkedIn profile optimization
🤝 Industry connections
💰 Freelancing guidance (Upwork, Fiverr)

🌟 Many graduates successfully start IT careers!

faqs.question: Does SMIT provide internships?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Internship Opportunities:

✅ Internship assistance for top students
🏢 Connections with IT companies
💼 Project-based practical experience
📝 Recommendation letters

💡 Build a strong portfolio during your course for better internship chances!

faqs.question: Where is SMIT located?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Campus Locations:

📍 Karachi: Bahadurabad, Gulshan, North Nazimabad, Korangi
📍 Lahore: Multiple branches
📍 Islamabad/Rawalpindi
📍 Faisalabad
📍 Multan
📍 Hyderabad
📍 Peshawar
📍 Quetta

🌐 Visit saylaniwelfare.com for nearest campus!

faqs.question: How to contact SMIT?
faqs.answer:
Contact SMIT:

🌐 Website: saylaniwelfare.com/smit
📞 Helpline: 0800-786-786
📧 Email: info@saylaniwelfare.com
📱 Social: @smikiofficial

🏢 Or visit your nearest campus during working hours!

faqs.question: Do I need a laptop?
faqs.answer:
Laptop Requirement:

✅ Recommended but NOT mandatory
✅ SMIT provides computer labs
✅ Lab access during class hours

💡 Having your own laptop helps with:
• Home practice
• Assignments
• Portfolio building

Many students complete courses using only lab computers!

faqs.question: Are online classes available?
faqs.answer:
Class Mode at SMIT:

🏫 Primary: On-campus physical classes
💻 Some courses have online components
📹 Recorded lectures may be available
🔄 Hybrid options in special circumstances

✅ Physical attendance recommended for best learning experience!

faqs.question: What is Saylani Welfare?
faqs.answer:
Saylani Welfare International Trust:

🏛️ One of Pakistan's largest welfare organizations
👤 Founded by Maulana Bashir Farooqi
🍽️ Provides: Free food (Dastarkhwan)
📚 Education (SMIT)
🏥 Healthcare services
💝 100% donation-funded
🌍 Serves humanity regardless of religion

faqs.question: What is the attendance requirement?
faqs.answer:
SMIT Attendance Policy:

📊 Minimum Required: 80% attendance
⚠️ Below 80%: May not receive certificate
📝 Leave requests: Submit in advance
🏥 Medical leave: Doctor certificate required

💡 Regular attendance is key to learning and certification!

faqs.question: Can I transfer to another campus?
faqs.answer:
Campus Transfer Policy:

✅ Transfer possible with valid reason
📝 Submit transfer request at current campus
⏰ May take 1-2 weeks to process
📌 Subject to seat availability

💡 Reasons: Relocation, job timing conflicts, etc.
Contact admin for assistance.
